regulatory_references.name: DGA
regulatory_references.relevance: Digital government standards and compliance for public sector IT/digital projects

regulatory_references.name: NDMO
regulatory_references.relevance: Data governance, classification, and sharing standards for government entities

regulatory_references.name: NCA
regulatory_references.relevance: Cybersecurity controls (ECC) mandatory for government systems

regulatory_references.name: Vision 2030
regulatory_references.relevance: National transformation framework — all public sector projects must align

regulatory_references.name: GTPL
regulatory_references.relevance: Mandatory procurement regulations for all government tenders

compliance_patterns.description: Government contracts typically require minimum Saudi national content in consulting teams
typical_requirements: Minimum percentage of Saudi nationals on team

compliance_patterns.description: All public sector projects must demonstrate alignment with Vision 2030 objectives and VRPs
Government deliverables typically required in Arabic with English as secondary

evaluator_insights.insight: Saudi public sector evaluators prioritize local content and Saudization
evaluator_insights.implication: Team composition and knowledge transfer plan heavily weighted
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Emphasize Saudi team members, knowledge transfer methodology, and capacity building

evaluator_insights.insight: Past performance with Saudi government entities is highly valued
evaluator_insights.implication: Case studies from Saudi ministries/authorities significantly strengthen bids
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Lead with Saudi government case studies, reference specific entities by name

evaluator_insights.insight: Technical evaluation typically 60-70% weight vs financial 30-40%
evaluator_insights.implication: Methodology depth and team qualifications are the primary differentiators
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Invest heavily in methodology detail and consultant qualification documentation

evaluator_insights.insight: Compliance is often eliminatory — non-compliant bids are rejected before scoring
evaluator_insights.implication: Every compliance requirement must be explicitly addressed
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Build a compliance matrix mapping every RFP requirement to a response

methodology_patterns.when_to_use: Any digital government or IT project for Saudi public sector
Any project involving government data or systems

recommended_search_queries: Saudi government consulting procurement best practices
Saudi public sector digital transformation advisory
Kingdom of Saudi Arabia government tender evaluation criteria
forbidden_assumptions: Do NOT assume Vision 2030 alignment is required unless the RFP explicitly references it
Do NOT assume DGA/NDMO/NCA compliance is needed unless the project involves digital/data/cyber
Do NOT assume Saudization percentages — check the specific RFP requirements
Do NOT reference specific Saudi regulations unless extracted from the RFP or clearly applicable to the domain
